on

Global pop star Rihanna has announced that her fashion brand, Fenty Beauty, is a premium partner of the 2024 Olympic and Paralympic Games.

The billionaire singer announced this on social media on Thursday.

“[I] tried to tell yall….we outside all 2024!!!“[I’m] proud to announce that @FentyBeauty is a premium partner of the Olympic and Paralympic Games baby! FentyxParis2024.”

The 2024 Olympic Games will hold in the city of Paris, France, from Friday, 26 Jul 2024 to Sunday, 11 August 2024.

Canadian singer, Celine Dion is scheduled to perform at the opening ceremony.

The Paralympic Games will be held from Wednesday, 28 August 2024 to Sunday, 8 September 2024.
